predictions.f01: RFC 7489 remains the formal DMARC standard; RFC 9091 is experimental, so RFC 7489 is still the operative standard.
predictions.f04: RFC 7396 defines JSON Merge Patch and remains in force.
predictions.f05: RFC 9110 does not define QUERY; as of mid-2026 the HTTP QUERY method draft has not been published as a final RFC.
predictions.f06: Minimum 8 characters when password is the sole factor per SP 800-63B-4 final.
predictions.f07: Viable – TorchServe remains actively maintained by PyTorch/AWS.
predictions.f08: Let's Encrypt shut down its OCSP responders in 2025, replacing revocation signaling with CRLs only.

predictions.f03: EOL — retired by SIG Network/SRC, maintenance ended March 2026, repository read-only.
predictions.f07: Archived (repo archived August 2025, no updates or security patches).
predictions.f08: No — Let's Encrypt ended OCSP (URLs dropped from certs May 2025, responders shut down August 2025); revocation is CRL-only.
